title: COLUMBIA GORGE PRIDE ALLIANCE - 211info
text: NEXT DOOR COLUMBIA GORGE PRIDE ALLIANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a safe and confidential space for all members of LGBTQIA2s+ to gain support and skills, socialize, and meet others by promoting equity and inclusion. Hosts Pride parades, youth outreach, community partnerships, networking and educational opportunities. 965 Tucker Road Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Age 16-20 LGBTQIA2S+ teen Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 386-6665 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 386-6665 Naomi Hill [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None LANGUAGES: English/ Spanish AREA SERVED: Hood River and Wasco counties Services: LGBTQ2+ Social Clubs LGBTQ2+ Support Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - HEALTH PROMOTION AND CHRONIC DISEASE PREVENTION EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - SUMMER CAMPS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - GORGE YOUTH MENTORING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTH PROMOTION SERVICES/NUESTRA COMUNIDAD SANA INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - MID-COLUMBIA HEALTH EQUITY ADVOCATES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUTH FAMILY SERVICES MATERIAL GOODS - CLOTHING AND TOYS CLOSET MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - TREATMENT SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NEXT DOOR
